200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Sets an enemy on fire if its health is below 50% dealing 36000 damage over 5 sec. The burning enemy receives 30% less healing and health when resurrected.

description 4/6

Sets an enemy on fire if its health is below 50% dealing 60000 damage over 5 sec. The burning enemy receives 30% less healing and health when resurrected. The burning enemy receives 50% less healing and health when resurrected. If an enemy dies while burning, it can’t be resurrected for 6 sec.

description 6/6

Sets an enemy on fire if its health is below 50%, dealing 100000 damage over 5 sec. The burning enemy receives 65% less healing and health when resurrected. If an enemy dies while burning, it can’t be resurrected for 8 sec. Once in a while, a fire blast occurs, dealing 200000 damage distributed among all enemies. Burning enemies receive 65% more damage from this ability.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

In addition to setting an enemy with critically low health on fire, the Incinerator explodes that unit. The explosion deals 100000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius.

description 4/6

In addition to setting an enemy with critically low health on fire, the Incinerator explodes that unit. The explosion deals 100000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius. An enemy that died while burning explodes and deals 150000 magic damage to all enemies in a small radius. Also, all enemies affected by the explosion are set on fire. The burning units take 150000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 65% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

In addition to setting an enemy with critically low health on fire, the Incinerator explodes that unit. The explosion deals 100000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius. An enemy that died while burning explodes and deals 150000 magic damage to all enemies in a small radius. Also, all enemies affected by the explosion are set on fire. The burning units take 150000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 65% for 5 sec. The Incinerator’s fire blast deals max damage to all affected enemies.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Whenever an enemy is set on fire by the Incinerator. Their spell power is reduced by 10% and their physical armor by 10% for 4 sec. Up to 3 effects.

description 4/6

Whenever an enemy is set on fire by the Incinerator. Their spell power is reduced by 10% and their physical armor by 10% for 4 sec. Up to 3 effects. When the Incinerator has less than 30% health, it cannot be set on fire.

description 6/6

Whenever an enemy is set on fire by the Incinerator. Their spell power is reduced by 10% and their physical armor by 10% for 4 sec. Up to 3 effects. When the Incinerator has less than 30% health, it cannot be set on fire. After a fire blast, the Incinerator takes no magic damage for 3 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Whenever an enemy is set on fire, the Incinerator’s spell power is increased by 25% for 4 sec. Up to 3 effects.

description 4/6

Whenever an enemy is set on fire, the Incinerator’s spell power is increased by 25% for 4 sec. Up to 3 effects. The Incinerator’s spell power is increased by 10% for every burning enemy for the duration of the battle.

description 6/6

Whenever an enemy is set on fire, the Incinerator’s spell power is increased by 25% for 4 sec. Up to 3 effects. The Incinerator’s spell power is increased by 10% for every burning enemy for the duration of the battle. Fire blast removes 2 random positive effects from all affected enemies.

Materials

Dragon Flame
Dragon Tooth
